channel.title: Books on Yuming Fu's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Books on Yuming Fu's Homepage

item.title: Books I wrote or translated
item.description: Here are books that I have written or translated. The covers are hosted locally on this site, with links to shop or publisher pages when available.

item.title: Some useful books for astronomers
item.description:
Textbooks or lecture notes

Astronomy, Astrophysics and Cosmology

  • Textbook on spherical astronomy, by W. M. Smart, and R. M. Green. Cambridge University Press, 1977.

Technical books or manuals

(Astro)Statistics, Data Mining, Machine Learning and AI

  • Introduction to Statistical Machine Learning, by Masashi Sugiyama. Elsevier Inc., 2016.
